reason: Backend quality checklist for Worker, Durable Object, protocol, and observer API changes.
Verify module ownership, route contracts, and observer boundaries.
Verify protocol errors remain observable and secrets are not exposed.
Verify official proto authority, tests, typecheck, build, and proto drift expectations.
Verify Durable Object storage remains summary-oriented and validated.
Verify relay events are safe and do not include secrets/raw packets.
Frontend quality checklist for dashboard/API contract changes.
Verify dashboard imports shared observer DTOs and keeps fetch helpers centralized.
Verify Kumo/read-only dashboard behavior and empty states.
Verify polling preserves previous successful data through transient errors.
Verify API DTO changes are typed and optional fields are safely handled.
Verify frontend typecheck, tests, and build requirements.
Review cross-layer data flow from protocol decode to dashboard display.
Review protocol helper reuse and avoid duplicated constants/parsers.
Primary acceptance criteria for EasyTier full-member integration.
Protocol feasibility and staged implementation plan to check against.
